weare.title: We Are ESAP
weare.description: The core platform of the ESAP universe. Browse character profiles, explore technical documentation, understand organizational structures, and dive deep into character relationships through interactive graphs.

stories.title: ESAP Stories
stories.description: An immersive sci-fi story reading experience. Branching narratives, chapter unlocks, scene exploration — become part of the story.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: All our code is open source on GitHub. Contributions are welcome.
